sections.heading: Sentences and paragraphs practice
sections.body:
Practice these words and sentences:

Words: See sentences below

The art of programming is the skill of controlling complexity.
Simplicity is prerequisite for reliability.
First solve the problem then write the code.
The only way to learn a new programming language is by writing programs in it.
Programs must be written for people to read.
Any fool can write code that a computer can understand.
Good code is its own best documentation.
Before software can be reusable it first has to be usable.

sections.heading: Practice Tips
sections.body:
1. Keep your eyes on the screen
2. Use proper finger placement
3. Start slow, accuracy first
4. Speed will come with practice

jargon.definition: Words Per Minute - typing speed measure

summary: Complete this lesson to improve your Sentences and paragraphs practice skills.
